name: bulkOperationRunQuery

name: productOptionsReorder

name: inventorySetQuantities

name: inventoryMoveQuantities
supportNotes: Stages same-location quantity moves locally over product-backed inventory levels. Captured 2025-01 available-to-damaged moves update named level quantities and variant inventoryQuantity while preserving on_hand and product totalInventory lag.

name: inventoryShipmentCreateInTransit
supportNotes: Stages an in-transit shipment locally and increases the destination inventory item's incoming quantity in the first known product-backed inventory level.

name: inventoryShipmentAddItems
supportNotes: Stages line-item additions for local draft/in-transit shipments and updates incoming inventory for in-transit additions.

name: inventoryShipmentRemoveItems
supportNotes: Stages line-item removal for local draft/in-transit shipments and reverses unreceived incoming inventory for removed in-transit items.

name: inventoryShipmentUpdateItemQuantities
supportNotes: Stages local shipment line quantity changes, rejecting quantities below already received amounts and updating incoming inventory deltas for in-transit shipments.

name: inventoryShipmentSetTracking
supportNotes: Stages local shipment tracking details for unreceived shipments.

name: inventoryShipmentMarkInTransit
supportNotes: Stages draft-to-in-transit transition locally and increases incoming inventory for unreceived shipment quantities.

name: inventoryShipmentReceive
supportNotes: Stages accepted/rejected receipt quantities locally. Accepted quantities move from incoming to available/on_hand inventory; rejected quantities only reduce incoming.

name: inventoryShipmentDelete
supportNotes: Deletes local draft/in-transit shipments and reverses unreceived incoming inventory for in-transit shipment lines. Received shipments return a local status userError.

supportNotes: HAR-311 declared blocker. Requires captured reverse-delivery tracking/label update semantics and downstream reverseDelivery read effects before support.

name: reverseFulfillmentOrderDispose
supportNotes: HAR-311 declared blocker. Requires disposition semantics, inventory/location effects, reverse fulfillment order status updates, and downstream reads before support.

name: draftOrderAvailableDeliveryOptions
supportNotes: Captured 2025-01 no-data behavior returns empty delivery-rate/local-delivery/local-pickup arrays and empty pageInfo. Local snapshot/live-hybrid helper reads mirror that empty/no-data shape.

name: draftOrderSavedSearches
supportNotes: Captured 2025-01 default draft-order saved searches are modeled as a stable local connection and can drive local bulk helper search selection by savedSearchId.

name: draftOrderTag
supportNotes: Blocked on valid-ID evidence. HAR-318 live probing showed raw tag strings fail ID validation and guessed gid://shopify/DraftOrderTag/<tag> IDs return null; no exposed catalog produced valid DraftOrderTag IDs. Runtime can synthesize local staged tag IDs for internal consistency, but registry support remains false until a real valid-id capture exists.

name: draftOrderCalculate
supportNotes: Local support calculates DraftOrderInput into a CalculatedDraftOrder-like payload without staging or runtime Shopify writes. Covered fields share the draft-order pricing model and captured empty availableShippingRates behavior.

name: draftOrderInvoicePreview
supportNotes: Local support returns deterministic preview subject/html for staged draft orders and never sends invoice email or writes upstream.

name: discountCodeBasicCreate
supportNotes: HAR-193 stages native code-basic create locally with downstream discount reads and commit replay ID mapping. BXGY, free-shipping, automatic, and app-discount writes remain outside this support slice.

name: discountCodeBasicUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-193 stages native code-basic updates locally for existing local discount records and preserves captured unknown-id DiscountUserError behavior.

name: discountCodeBxgyCreate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native code BXGY create locally with product, variant, and collection references, read-after-write discount detail/catalog visibility, and captured validation guardrails. This models Admin GraphQL visibility only and does not claim checkout price-calculation behavior.

name: discountCodeBxgyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native code BXGY updates for existing local BXGY code discounts and preserves downstream reads. Shared code activate/deactivate/delete roots apply to staged BXGY code discounts through the normalized discount state.

name: discountCodeBulkActivate
supportNotes: HAR-197 keeps the broad code-bulk status root unimplemented. Blank/all-discount destructive selectors are refused locally; other unsupported selectors remain visible through unsupported mutation passthrough observability until full bulk lifecycle staging exists.

name: discountCodeBulkDeactivate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures selector-conflict validation guardrails only. HAR-197 additionally refuses blank/all-discount destructive selectors locally. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeBulkDelete
supportNotes: HAR-197 keeps the broad code-bulk delete root unimplemented. Blank/all-discount destructive selectors are refused locally; other unsupported selectors remain visible through unsupported mutation passthrough observability until full bulk lifecycle staging exists.

name: discountRedeemCodeBulkAdd
supportNotes: HAR-197 locally stages safe explicit-code add branches and records completed bulk-creation state, but keeps the root unimplemented until full async job lifecycle and conformance-backed failure semantics are modeled.

name: discountCodeRedeemCodeBulkDelete
supportNotes: HAR-197 locally stages safe id-scoped delete branches and records completed job state, but keeps the root unimplemented until search/saved-search selectors, async lifecycle, and conformance-backed failure semantics are modeled.

name: discountAutomaticBxgyCreate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native automatic BXGY create locally with product, variant, and collection references, read-after-write discount detail/catalog visibility, and captured validation guardrails. This models Admin GraphQL visibility only and does not claim checkout price-calculation behavior.

name: discountAutomaticBxgyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native automatic BXGY updates for existing local BXGY automatic discounts and preserves downstream reads. Shared automatic activate/deactivate/delete roots apply to staged BXGY automatic discounts through the normalized discount state.

name: discountAutomaticBulkDelete
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures selector-conflict validation guardrails only. HAR-197 additionally refuses blank/all-discount destructive selectors locally. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountCodeAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: marketingActivities
supportNotes: Snapshot/local read support for captured selected fields, empty connections, filtering, sorting, reverse ordering, cursor/pageInfo shapes, and staged external activity lifecycle overlays.

name: marketingActivity
supportNotes: Snapshot/local singular lookup support for captured selected fields. Missing IDs return null; staged external activity lifecycle mutations are visible immediately.

name: marketingEvent
supportNotes: Snapshot/local singular lookup support for captured selected fields. Missing IDs return null; no arbitrary marketing event records are synthesized.

name: marketingEvents
supportNotes: Snapshot/local read support for captured selected fields, empty connections, filtering, sorting, reverse ordering, cursor/pageInfo shapes, and staged external activity lifecycle overlays.

name: marketingActivityCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for payload, validation, status transitions, and downstream read visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for update payloads, userErrors, and downstream activity/event reads.

name: marketingActivityCreateExternal
supportNotes: Locally stages external activity creation from captured write_marketing_events evidence. Preserves remoteId/UTM attribution, selected Shopify-like fields, userErrors, original mutation log retention, and downstream marketingActivity/marketingActivities visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdateExternal
supportNotes: Locally stages external activity updates by remoteId or local staged id from captured write_marketing_events evidence. UTM mutation attempts return captured immutable-UTM userErrors; downstream marketing reads observe the updated activity/event fields.

name: marketingActivityUpsertExternal
supportNotes: Locally stages external activity upserts using remoteId identity from captured write_marketing_events evidence. Missing remoteIds create staged activity/event rows; existing remoteIds update staged fields while preserving immutable UTM attribution.

name: marketingActivityDeleteExternal
supportNotes: Locally stages external activity deletion by remoteId or staged id from captured write_marketing_events evidence. Missing activities return captured userErrors and successful deletes hide activity/event rows from downstream reads.

name: marketingActivitiesDeleteAllExternal
supportNotes: Locally stages bulk external activity deletion and returns a Shopify-like asynchronous Job payload from captured write_marketing_events evidence. Downstream marketing reads hide locally known external activities after the staged delete-all.

name: marketingEngagementCreate
supportNotes: Locally stages activity-level marketing engagement metrics by marketing activity ID or remote ID from captured write_marketing_events evidence. Duplicate same-day writes replace the local engagement record; captured userErrors cover missing/invalid identifiers and unrecognized channel handles. Immediate downstream activity adSpend remains unchanged to match captured Shopify reads.

name: marketingEngagementsDelete
supportNotes: Locally stages channel-level engagement deletion with captured selector validation. Activity-level engagement writes are retained because Shopify exposes no activity-level selector on marketingEngagementsDelete; delete-all removes known local channel engagement records and returns the captured result shape.

name: webhookSubscription
supportNotes: Local snapshot/live-hybrid reads are modeled for API-created webhook subscription records in normalized state. Unknown IDs return null. Create/update/delete staging remains unsupported until a local mutation lifecycle model exists.

name: webhookSubscriptions
supportNotes: Local snapshot/live-hybrid catalog reads are modeled for API-created webhook subscriptions with normalized nodes, edges, pageInfo, stable synthetic cursors, ID sorting, reverse ordering, pagination, and simple captured query filtering. App TOML webhooks remain out of scope.

name: webhookSubscriptionsCount
supportNotes: Local snapshot/live-hybrid count reads are synthesized from normalized API-created webhook subscription state with Shopify-like count/precision fields and limit-aware AT_LEAST precision.

name: webhookSubscriptionCreate
supportNotes: Local staging is supported for the HAR-267 captured Admin API-created HTTP URI registration subset, including topic, format, includeFields, metafieldNamespaces, filter, endpoint callbackUrl projection, missing URI userErrors, mutation-log retention, and downstream detail/catalog/count read-after-write visibility. App TOML webhook config and webhook delivery remain out of scope.

name: webhookSubscriptionUpdate
supportNotes: Local staging updates staged or hydrated webhook subscriptions for the HAR-267 captured Admin API-created HTTP URI subset, including format, includeFields, metafieldNamespaces, filter, endpoint callbackUrl projection, unknown-id userErrors, mutation-log retention, and downstream detail/catalog/count read-after-write visibility without runtime Shopify writes.

name: webhookSubscriptionDelete
supportNotes: Local staging deregisters staged or hydrated API-created webhook subscriptions for the HAR-267 captured subset, returning deletedWebhookSubscriptionId/userErrors payloads, preserving raw mutation-log replay order, and making downstream detail/catalog/count reads observe deletion without runtime Shopify writes. Unknown or already deleted IDs return the captured Webhook subscription does not exist userError; missing/null ID branches return Shopify-like GraphQL validation errors locally.

name: segment
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured read_customers segment detail baseline. Snapshot mode serves captured selected fields locally and returns Shopify-like null plus NOT_FOUND for unknown segment IDs.

name: segments
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured cursor/pageInfo payloads when hydrated and otherwise returns an empty connection; broader search/sort grammar remains unsupported until captured.

name: segmentsCount
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured count precision baseline. Snapshot mode returns captured count/precision when hydrated and EXACT zero for empty local state.

name: segmentFilters
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter metadata baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured selected filter fields or returns an empty connection when no metadata has been hydrated.

name: segmentFilterSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter suggestion baseline for a search argument. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured search grammar remains unsupported.

name: segmentValueSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured value suggestion baseline for customer_tags. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured filters remain unsupported.

name: segmentMigrations
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured migration catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured migration connection shape or returns an empty connection.

name: customerSegmentMembers
supportNotes: HAR-217 captured member connection behavior for query, queryId, and segmentId reads. Local support is intentionally limited to number_of_orders numeric comparisons and customer_tags CONTAINS string matches over effective customer state; unsupported segment grammar is not claimed.

name: customerSegmentMembersQuery
supportNotes: HAR-217 stages customer segment member query jobs locally and models immediate downstream lookup after the captured async job shape. Missing query IDs preserve Shopify's captured null plus INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR response.

name: customerSegmentMembership
supportNotes: HAR-217 models membership booleans for existing local/staged segments using the selected supported query grammar, skips unknown segment IDs, and returns false for known segments when the customer is absent or does not match.

name: customerSegmentMembersQueryCreate
supportNotes: HAR-217 locally stages query jobs and retains the original raw mutation for commit replay. Creation returns Shopify-like pending job fields while the stored local job is immediately available for downstream lookup/member reads.

name: segmentCreate
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment creation locally with synthetic IDs/timestamps, captured blank/invalid-query validation, Shopify-like duplicate-name suffixing, and downstream segment catalog/count/detail reads.

name: segmentUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment updates locally with captured unknown-ID/validation userErrors, query/name replacement, duplicate-name suffixing, and read-after-write visibility.

name: segmentDelete
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment deletion locally, returns captured unknown-ID userErrors, and removes deleted segments from downstream detail/catalog/count reads.

name: priceListCreate
supportNotes: Stages local price-list lifecycle state for Markets reads. Validation is conservative and fixture gaps are documented in docs/endpoints/markets.md.

name: priceListUpdate
supportNotes: Stages local name, currency, parent adjustment, catalog link, and fixed-price reset-on-currency-change behavior for PriceList records.

name: priceListFixedPricesByProductUpdate
supportNotes: Stages product-scoped fixed-price upserts/deletes only for variants visible in normalized product state.

name: quantityPricingByVariantUpdate
supportNotes: Stages PriceList fixed prices, variant quantity rules, and quantity price breaks for variants visible in normalized product state.

name: marketLocalizableResource
supportNotes: Supports product metafield-backed MarketLocalizableResource reads for the current 2026-04 METAFIELD resource type.

name: marketLocalizableResources
supportNotes: Supports resourceType: METAFIELD over product metafields; METAOBJECT returns the Shopify-like empty local slice until metaobject state exists.

name: marketLocalizableResourcesByIds
supportNotes: Supports product metafield resource IDs and ignores unknown IDs with Shopify-like empty connection behavior.

name: marketLocalizationsRegister
supportNotes: Stages market-specific values for product metafield resources only; validates market ID, key, digest, blank value, and missing input without upstream writes.

name: marketLocalizationsRemove
supportNotes: Removes staged market-specific product metafield values locally and returns removed localization payloads.

name: availableLocales
supportNotes: Serves the captured locale catalog slice locally, with snapshot state allowed to override the default seed.

name: shopLocales
supportNotes: Serves shop locale reads from local state, including staged enable, update, disable, and published filtering.

name: translatableResource
supportNotes: Supports PRODUCT and product METAFIELD resources from the normalized local graph; missing or unsupported resources return null.

name: translatableResources
supportNotes: Supports resourceType PRODUCT and METAFIELD over locally known products/product metafields; other resource types return an explicit empty connection.

name: translatableResourcesByIds
supportNotes: Resolves locally known product and product-metafield IDs and ignores unknown IDs with Shopify-like empty connection behavior.

name: shopLocaleEnable
supportNotes: Stages session-local locale enablement without mutating Shopify; locale names come from the captured availableLocales slice.

name: shopLocaleUpdate
supportNotes: Stages published-state and market-web-presence association updates for locally known shop locales.

name: shopLocaleDisable
supportNotes: Stages non-primary locale removal locally and returns the disabled locale string.

name: translationsRegister
supportNotes: Stages translations for PRODUCT and product METAFIELD resources after local key, digest, locale, and value validation; market-specific translation inputs are explicit unsupported branches.

name: translationsRemove
supportNotes: Removes staged/base translations for supported local product and product-metafield resources without runtime Shopify writes.

name: files
supportNotes: Serves snapshot and locally staged Files API records from normalized file state; live-hybrid overlay currently prefers local file state when present rather than merging upstream file catalogs.

name: fileSavedSearches
supportNotes: Returns Shopify-like empty saved-search connections in snapshot mode; saved search records are not modeled yet.

name: stagedUploadsCreate
supportNotes: Returns inert draft-proxy staged upload target metadata without creating external upload storage or acknowledging uploaded content.

name: fileAcknowledgeUpdateFailed
supportNotes: Explicitly unsupported because acknowledging upload failure is an external Files API side effect; this registry entry is a commitment to model failure state locally before support, not a permanent passthrough capability.
